name: gemini_FastAPI_WebSock
description: Pattern learned during Fixing Live Price Feed: FastAPI WebSocket: Use an explicitly empty await receive_text() loop to keep connections alive properly (instead of sleep) to prevent premature closes

name: gemini_Next.js_WebSock
description: Pattern learned during Fixing Live Price Feed: Next.js WebSocket + Dev: Set reactStrictMode to false in next.config.js to prevent double mounting bugs with long-lived WebSocket connections
